metadata.description: Browse Amazon Best Sellers for external SSDs and add two units of the number-two Samsung T7 1TB Gray drive to the local cart.

instruction: Open http://host.docker.internal:8153/. On Amazon, browse Best Sellers in External Solid State Drives, open the #2 Samsung T7 Portable SSD 1TB in Gray, choose quantity 2, and add it to the cart.

judge_context.rubric: PASS only if the same local browser session first visits the External Solid State Drives Best Sellers page, then opens the rank-two Samsung T7 listing with ASIN B0874XN4D8, selects quantity 2, and sends exactly one successful form-encoded POST to the source-observed responsive Add to cart path (/gp/product/handle-buy-box/ref=dp_start-bbf_1_glance on desktop or /cart/add-to-cart/ref=mw_dp_buy_crt on mobile) with ASIN=B0874XN4D8 and quantity=2. The terminal request, local cart UI, request journal, and SQLite cart row must agree. Normal quantity-one or quantity-three cart actions do not complete this task. Reject another ASIN, another rank, another capacity or color, an out-of-order/direct/stale terminal injection, a duplicate task completion, any checkout/payment attempt, or any external Amazon/analytics request.
judge_context.reference_solution: Open Best Sellers, choose Computers & Accessories, Computer Accessories & Peripherals, Data Storage, External Solid State Drives, then open the #2 Samsung T7 Portable SSD 1TB in Gray. Set Quantity to 2 and select Add to cart. Confirm the local cart shows two Samsung T7 drives and stop before checkout.
